note: As-built diagram set for /gogo:skills. The flow (audit/directed → classify → approval gate → kind-routed extract) held from phase ① and ships as-built; phase ⑤ adds the runtime sequence of the propose→STOP→extract hand-off. No new types or state machine warranted class/activity diagrams.

diagrams.title: /gogo:skills runtime flow: scan/measure/discover or directed, classify, gate, kind-routed extract
Propose → STOP → per-candidate approve → kind-routed extract, with parent pointer + registry update
